creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Sun, 31 Jan 1999 jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de wrote:

> -# Date created:        			12/01/1998
> -# Whom:                			nectar@FreeBSD.ORG

> +# Date created:        			30 January 1999
> +# Whom:                			jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de

No. These two values are for the initial creation.

> -# $Id: Makefile,v 1.7 1999/01/07 05:51:24 nectar Exp $
> +# $Id$

No. Please don't clear the $Id: $ tags, even if this is how things were
done, you're missing a ":"

> -MAINTAINER=	nectar@FreeBSD.ORG
> +MAINTAINER=	jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de

Did you ask the original maintainer?
